name: Feature request

---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that YAMBLOG doesn't support today?

## Proposed solution

What would you like to happen? A sketch of the API you'd want is very welcome:

```ts
// e.g. blog.getPostsByAuthor('jane')
```

## Alternatives considered

Workarounds you've tried, or other ways this could be solved.

## Which package(s)?

- [ ] `@yamblog/core`
- [ ] `@yamblog/next`
- [ ] `@yamblog/react`
- [ ] `@yamblog/astro`
- [ ] `@yamblog/remark`
- [ ] docs / website
